Orbit 80/40 or 60/60 or OFF (1-11 = 80/40; 101-111 = 60/60; 12 = switch off),Orbit type,Thermal orbit number,Thermal orbit start (TDN2(n)+2min),Thermal orbit end (TDN2(n+1)+2min-1s),Thermal orbit duration (s),Nightside nadir start = TD2N(n),Nightside nadir end = TN2D(n)-1s,Nightside duration (s),Dayside nadir start = TN2D(n),Dayside nadir end = TD2N(n+1)-1s,Dayside duration (s),Dayside nadir min. phase angle (deg),Dayside nadir min. phase angle time (UTC)
